texto: Capitalism does not merely oppressworkers on the factory floor. It creates anentire culture in which the logic of oppressionand competition become commonsense. It turns people against each otherand their mvn humanity. Like Franz Kafka'scharacter in The Metamorphosis, GregorSamsa, people are alienated from theirhuman selves, isolated from their fellmvbeings, and tortured by the loss of all thatcould be possible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Nivedita Majumdar: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Capitalism does not merely oppressworkers on the factory floor. It creates anentire culture in wh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, alienation, capitalism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e trabalho.
